## Accessibility

<!-- For UI changes, confirm WCAG 2.1 AA compliance: -->

- [ ] Colour contrast meets 4.5:1 (normal text) or 3:1 (large text)
- [ ] All interactive elements are keyboard accessible
- [ ] ARIA roles and labels added where needed
- [ ] No keyboard traps introduced

## Privacy / Compliance

- [ ] No new personal information is collected

- [ ] No new third-party scripts or tracking pixels added
- [ ] New user-visible strings added to both EN and FR translations
